description: Estilos artísticos y visuales con modificadores de prompt optimizados para FLUX Dev

styles.name: Hyperrealism
styles.prompt_fragment: hyperrealistic, photorealistic render, ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, lifelike textures, physically accurate lighting, indistinguishable from photography

styles.name: Cyberpunk
styles.prompt_fragment: cyberpunk aesthetic, neon-lit rain-soaked streets, dystopian megacity, glowing holographic signs, tech-noir atmosphere, cyan and magenta color grading

styles.name: Dark Fantasy
styles.prompt_fragment: dark fantasy art, gothic atmosphere, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, ominous mood, intricate arcane details, painterly texture, deep shadows

styles.name: Pixar Style
styles.prompt_fragment: Pixar-style 3D render, soft subsurface scattering, expressive stylized characters, warm color palette, smooth rounded forms, cinematic animated look

styles.name: Synthwave
styles.prompt_fragment: synthwave retro-futuristic aesthetic, purple and pink neon glow, chrome grid landscape, 80s sci-fi nostalgia, laser beams, sunset gradient horizon

styles.name: Comic Book
styles.prompt_fragment: comic book art style, bold ink outlines, Ben-Day dots, flat cel shading, dynamic action lines, vibrant primary colors, Marvel or DC illustration style

styles.name: Studio Ghibli
styles.prompt_fragment: Studio Ghibli inspired, hand-painted watercolor backgrounds, soft anime aesthetics, lush natural environments, whimsical atmosphere, warm pastel tones

styles.name: Watercolor
styles.prompt_fragment: watercolor painting, soft wet-on-wet blending, visible paper texture, translucent washes, delicate brushstrokes, loose impressionistic style

styles.name: Oil Painting
styles.prompt_fragment: classical oil painting, old master technique, rich impasto texture, glazed luminous colors, Renaissance or Baroque style, museum-quality fine art

styles.name: Flat Design
styles.prompt_fragment: flat design illustration, minimal geometric shapes, clean solid colors, no gradients or shadows, modern UI aesthetic, vector art style

styles.name: Steampunk
styles.prompt_fragment: steampunk aesthetic, Victorian industrial machinery, brass and copper tones, clockwork gears, steam-powered devices, sepia-tinted atmosphere, retrofuturistic engineering

styles.name: Low Poly
styles.prompt_fragment: low poly 3D art, geometric faceted surfaces, minimalist polygon mesh, flat shaded triangles, clean pastel color blocks, abstract digital sculpture

styles.name: Noir
styles.prompt_fragment: film noir style, high contrast black and white, dramatic hard shadows, venetian blind light patterns, moody atmospheric fog, 1940s detective aesthetic

styles.name: Ukiyo-e
styles.prompt_fragment: ukiyo-e Japanese woodblock print, flat bold outlines, limited color palette, decorative patterns, traditional Edo period aesthetic, Hokusai or Hiroshige inspired

styles.name: Glitchcore
styles.prompt_fragment: glitchcore digital art, RGB channel displacement, pixel corruption artifacts, data moshing effect, chromatic aberration, fragmented scan lines, digital decay aesthetic
